## What type of contribution is this?

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New/updated Python script
- [ ] New template
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other: ___

## What does this do?

<!-- One or two sentences: what automation does this add or fix? -->

## How to use it

<!-- How does a team member invoke this skill/agent/script? Include the exact command or invocation. -->

## Test evidence

<!-- Screenshot, paste of output, or description of what you tested -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Naming follows `<domain>-<action>` convention — see [README.md#naming-conventions](../README.md#naming-conventions)
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has all required sections (if adding a skill)
- [ ] Validator passed: `python scripts/repo/validate_skill.py <path>` (if adding a skill)
- [ ] Catalog updated: `python scripts/repo/generate_catalog.py`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Tested end-to-end at least once
